title: Metabolomics of aging assessed in individual parasitoid wasps.
author: Kapranas A Snart CJ Williams H Hardy IC Barrett DA
content: S-EPMC5054366 PMC5054366 Metabolomics of aging assessed in individual parasitoid wasps. Metabolomics studies of low-biomass organisms, such as small insects, have previously relied on the pooling of biological samples to overcome detection limits, particularly using NMR. We show
